revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:朝宮神社 (春日井市)]] {{Expand Japanese|朝宮神社 (春日井市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Asamiya Shrine | native_name = 朝宮神社 (春日井市) | image = Asamiya zinzya.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Asamiya Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.251715|136.960522}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | website = {{Official website|https://aichi-jinjacho.or.jp/search_detail.html?id=99d5ba77-83a7-4ea4-9b52-83d2d07bb8aa}} }} {{nihongo|'''Asamiya Shrine'''|朝宮神社 (春日井市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11465292|ltq=Q11465292|qid=Q11465292|1=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province}} ** Series ordinal: 91 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039533|ltq=Q135039533|qid=Q135039533|1=Kaneno Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Tanahatano Shrine|lt=Tanahatano Shrine|qid=Q135039536|1=Tanahatano Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q26101|ltq=Q26101|qid=Q26101|1=Kasugai, Aichi}} * {{ill|Q514506|ltq=Q514506|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} * {{ill|Yamada district, Owari|lt=Yamada district, Owari|ja|山田郡 (尾張国)|zh|山田郡 (尾張國)|qid=Q11470699|1=Yamada district, Owari}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.251715|136.960522}} == official website (P856) == * https://aichi-jinjacho.or.jp/search_detail.html?id=99d5ba77-83a7-4ea4-9b52-83d2d07bb8aa == image (P18) == * Asamiya zinzya.JPG == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181431 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9180005008054 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135039534|ltq=Q135039534|qid=Q135039534|1=Wanirano Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県春日井市朝宮町1-12', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '愛知県長久手市宮脇', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:朝宮神社 (春日井市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11517375}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Asamiya Shrine |Image = [[File:Asamiya zinzya.JPG|270px]]
Torii gate and worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kasugai City|Q26101|qid=Q26101|1=Kasugai, Aichi}} Asamiya-chō 1-12 |Coordinates = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|15|6|N|136|57|38|E|}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Atagatasu-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Tatetewani-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|lt=Kikurihime-no-Kami|Q11619891|qid=Q11619891|lt=Kikurihime-no-Mikoto|1=Kikurihime}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} |Founded = |Main hall = Misetana-zukuri, copper-plate roofing |Alternate names = |Pilgrimage status, etc. = |Annual festival = October |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Asamiya Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Asamiya Shrine''' (Asamiya Jinja) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Asamiya-chō (Kasugai City)|Q18700422|qid=Q18700422|lt=Asamiya-chō|1=Asamiya-chō, Kasugai}}, {{ill|lt=Kasugai City|Q26101|qid=Q26101|1=Kasugai, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. === Overview === It is identified with '''Waniyoshi Shrine''' of {{ill|lt=Yamada District (Owari Province)|Q11470699|qid=Q11470699|lt=Yamada District|1=Yamada district, Owari}}, {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}}, as listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}; however, there are multiple shrines considered descendant shrines of Waniyoshi Shrine, including {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Waniyoshi Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Kamijō-chō (Kasugai City)|Q11359359|qid=Q11359359|lt=Kamijō-chō|1=Jōjō-chō}}, Kasugai City, and the identification is not definitive. According to shrine tradition, Waniyoshi Shrine, which had been enshrined in Asamiya-chō, was rebuilt in {{ill|lt=Kenpō|Q1194251|qid=Q1194251|1=Kempo (era)}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1218|Q5381|qid=Q5381|1=1218}}) by {{ill|lt=Kosaka Mitsuyoshi|Q11459397|qid=Q11459397|1=Kosaka Mitsuyoshi}}, lord of {{ill|lt=Kamijō Castle (Owari Province)|Q532489|qid=Q532489|lt=Kamijō Castle|1=Jōjō Castle}}, at {{ill|lt=Kamijō-chō (Kasugai City)|Q11359359|qid=Q11359359|lt=Kamijō-chō|1=Jōjō-chō}} under the new name Waniyoshi Hakusan Shrine. At the former site in Asamiya-chō, {{ill|lt=Kikurihime-no-Kami|Q11619891|qid=Q11619891|lt=Kikurihime-no-Mikoto|1=Kikurihime}} was invited and enshrined from {{ill|lt=Hakusan Hime Shrine|Q704702|qid=Q704702|1=Shirayama Hime Shrine}}, located in {{ill|lt=Hakusan City|Q696407|qid=Q696407|1=Hakusan, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|qid=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}, and the shrine came to be called '''Asamiya Hakusan-gū'''. During the {{ill|lt=Sengoku period (Japan)|Q204023|qid=Q204023|lt=Sengoku period|1=Sengoku period}}, the shrine buildings were destroyed by warfare, but they were rebuilt in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}. A monument to {{ill|lt=Asamiya Palace|Q11517371|qid=Q11517371|1=Asamiya Palace}} stands adjacent to the shrine. === References === * Kasugai City Board of Education (ed.), *History of Kasugai City*, District History volume, p. 330 === Footnotes === {{Reflist}} === Related articles === * {{ill|lt=Daikō-ji (Kasugai City)|Q11432464|qid=Q11432464|1=Daiko-ji Temple}} * {{ill|lt=Kamijō Castle (Owari Province)|Q532489|qid=Q532489|1=Jōjō Castle}} === External links === * [http://www.ma.ccnw.ne.jp/my1/b.html Asamiya Shrine] (Kasugai Digital Museum) Accessible from specific computers only {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Asamiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Asamiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:春日井市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kasugai, Aichi]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kasugai, Aichi]]
